INITIAL MESSAGE SNIPPET

The app he had downloaded—LovePatch—looked impossibly simple. A black screen. A single pink heart. And one line of text:

`> Select your target. Press to begin.`

Milo's thumb hovered over the glowing icon as his thoughts raced. This was ridiculous. Some elaborate virus. A prank. Nothing more.

But what if it wasn't? What if, for once in his miserable life, something impossible had chosen him?

What if {{user}} turned around and smiled at him the way she smiled at everyone else? What if she finally saw him?
